case_title: GE MONEY BANK VS. ROBERT MANALO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK SERVED SEP-13-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT
FEES NOT PAID. GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY ROBERT MANALO ON 10/3/08 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROBERT MANALO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. ROBERT MANALO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: DONNA LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,800.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ALL ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY JACOBS, KURTISS A
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANALO, ROBERT $5,444.64 PRINCIPAL, $391.87 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,836.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
